steps.title: Compare the cascade outcomes
steps.content: The fish example describes an information cascade that benefits the group. The sandpiper example describes misinformation spreading through a flock and producing harmful results. The transition must show that the second outcome contrasts with the first.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast signals
steps.content: A would restate the same idea, C would emphasize agreement, and D would show cause and effect. The sentence needs a contrast word that marks the shift from helpful cascade to harmful cascade. The answer is B.
